concerns.text: SC-001 requires a paired t-test or Wilcoxon signed-rank test for 'Time-to-Pivot' differences with 95% CIs. T029 only mentions generating a 'final report' and T025 focuses on mixed-effects logistic regression for success rates. No task explicitly implements the time-difference statistical test required by SC-001.

FR-002 mandates the system generate a rule library covering ≥90% of annotated failure patterns. T013 implements the model, and T014 mentions ensuring coverage, but there is no explicit task to calculate, validate, or enforce this 90% threshold metric against the validation split before proceeding. The requirement is untestable without a specific validation step.

FR-004 requires the system to execute the baseline agent on standard resources (4 cores, 16 GB RAM) as part of the defined system execution. T021 creates a script to run the baseline on 'external resources' (separate instance). While the plan corrects this, the task description lacks the explicit logic to merge these external results into the reproducible system output defined in FR-004, creating a gap in the 'System MUST execute' requirement.

FR-005 requires metrics to be 'stratified by the annotated failure feature type'. T023 adds logic to record metrics separately by failure type, but there is no task explicitly ensuring the final `results.csv` schema (required for US-3 analysis) includes the failure type as a column or that the stratification is persisted in the artifact structure, risking ambiguity in data consumption.
